# Image Prompt — `what-is-operational-intelligence` (Hero)

**Surface:** Top of article page (sits directly beneath dark navy title block)
**Aspect ratio:** 21:9 (1600×686)
**Type:** A (realistic editorial photography with subtle data context)
**Background:** Light — pale dawn light through floor-to-ceiling windows (light background satisfies IMAGE-STYLE.md §2a Hero Background Rule)
**Live asset:** `/public/images/blog/what-is-operational-intelligence-hero.png` (generated by Nano Banana 2 — `gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview`)
**Backup asset:** `/public/images/blog/what-is-operational-intelligence-hero.svg` (the earlier SVG infographic version — kept as fallback / alt composition)

---

## Composition Strategy

This hero uses the **"MORNING BRIEFING moment" angle** — depicting the calm, ordered moment when a leader is brought up to speed before the day begins. Universal across verticals. Conveys the article's resolution (intelligence delivered to you) without depicting the chaos the article diagnoses.

The thumbnail uses the OUTPUT angle (briefing card mockup). The body image uses the ARCHITECTURE angle (three-tier diagram). All three are distinct compositions on distinct backgrounds.

## The Prompt That Produced The Live Asset

Run via:
```
node .claude/skills/image-generation/scripts/generate-image.mjs \
  --prompt "<prompt below>" \
  --output "public/images/blog/what-is-operational-intelligence-hero.png" \
  --aspect "21:9" \
  --model "gemini-3.1-flash-image-preview"
```

Prompt:

```
Editorial photography in wide cinematic 21:9 banner composition. A premium minimalist desk in a modern executive workspace at the very beginning of dawn. On the desk: a single sleek tablet displaying a morning intelligence briefing interface — subtle categorized cards with small colored indicators (a hint of red dot, amber dot, green dot) visible on the screen. Beside the tablet: a simple ceramic coffee cup with soft rising steam. The desk surface is light, clean — pale oak or warm-toned natural material.

Floor-to-ceiling windows on the right side of the frame showing a soft sunrise over a contemporary cityscape, blurred shallow depth of field. Warm pale-blue and golden ambient light streams in from the right. Beyond the desk: a hint of architectural minimalism — clean lines, no clutter, no people, no faces, no hands.

Composition: tablet and coffee positioned in the left-center third of frame, taking strong visual weight. Open negative space on the right two-thirds. Hero subject sits in the lower-third weight.

Lighting: soft warm dawn light from the right casting long gentle shadows across the desk. Highlights on the tablet screen and coffee cup. Calm, ordered, premium, contemplative — the opposite of operational chaos.

Color palette: pale blue wash tones, warm whites, soft amber dawn light, subtle hints of primary blue (#38B6FF) glow from the tablet screen. Slightly desaturated, editorial feel.

Style: editorial photography meets premium SaaS marketing — like a New York Times tech feature or an Anthropic, Linear, or Stripe hero shot. Shot on a full-frame camera, 35mm lens, f/2.8.

No people, no faces, no hands, no dashboards on giant monitors, no stock photography clichés, no person staring at laptop, no thumbs-up, no heavy bokeh as main effect, no 3D render aesthetic, no vector illustration, no futuristic sci-fi elements, no readable text labels on the tablet screen — keep the briefing visible but text-illegible.
```

## Iteration Notes

- First generation landed well on the first try. If regenerating, the prompt is reliable.
- For variations: try changing time of day ("late afternoon golden hour"), location ("loft workspace with exposed brick"), or device ("laptop instead of tablet") to A/B alternative moods.
- For PRINCIPAL-LIFE silo articles using a similar emotional register, swap the tablet for a notebook + pen and shift the location to something more reflective (a window seat, a garden-facing desk).
